entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A cereal crop used in hybrid breeding and genetic research

entities.name: REFERENCE GENOME ASSEMBLY
entities.description: The process of creating a high-quality, chromosome-level genomic sequence for a species

entities.name: GLOBAL HETEROTIC POOL
entities.description: The diverse set of genetic backgrounds that contribute to heterosis in hybrid crops

entities.name: GENETIC VARIATION
entities.description: The diversity in genetic sequences among individuals of a species

entities.name: TIFT GENOME
entities.description: A specific improved reference genome assembly of pearl millet

entities.name: COMPARATIVE GENOME ANALYSIS
entities.description: The process of comparing genomic sequences between different lines or species to identify variations

entities.name: STRUCTURAL VARIATIONS
entities.description: Large-scale changes in the genome structure, such as deletions, duplications, or inversions

entities.name: INVERSIONS
entities.description: A type of structural variation where a segment of a chromosome is reversed end to end

entities.name: SERINE O-ACETYLTRANSFERASE
entities.description: A gene/enzyme involved in the metabolic process that improves seed protein quality

entities.name: GLYCEROL-3-PHOSPHATE METABOLIC PROCESS
entities.description: A biological process that plays a role in plant disease resistance

entities.name: NUTRIENT QUALITY OF SEED PROTEIN
entities.description: The nutritional value and composition of proteins in the seed

entities.name: DISEASE RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to resist or overcome plant diseases

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The amount of grain harvested per unit area

entities.name: AGRONOMIC TRAITS
entities.description: General characteristics of a crop that are economically important for agriculture

entities.name: GENOME-WIDE ASSOCIATION STUDY
entities.description: A method used to associate specific genetic markers with phenotypic traits

entities.name: MARKER-ASSISTED SELECTION
entities.description: A breeding method using molecular markers to select for desired traits

entities.name: WHOLE-GENOME PREDICTION
entities.description: A method using all available markers across the genome to predict the performance of a genotype

entities.name: HAPLOTYPE-BASED BREEDING
entities.description: A breeding approach based on the selection of specific combinations of alleles

entities.name: COMPLEX TRAITS
entities.description: Traits controlled by multiple genes and environmental factors

entities.name: MONO/OLIGOGENIC TRAITS
entities.description: Traits controlled by one or a few genes
